title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah cast his vote in the Ahmedabad Municipal Corporation (AMC) elections
text:
Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Home Affairs

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah cast his vote in the Ahmedabad Municipal Corporation (AMC) elections

Shri Amit Shah appealed to all voters to participate in this festival of democracy by casting their votes in large numbers

Posted On:
26 APR 2026 1:22PM by PIB Delhi

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah cast his vote in the Ahmedabad Municipal Corporation (AMC) elections.

In a post on X platform, Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah said that today, I cast vote in the Ahmedabad Municipal Corporation (AMC) elections. He appealed to all voters to participate in this festival of democracy by casting their votes in large numbers.

गुजरात में चल रहे नगर निकाय चुनावों के तहत अहमदाबाद नगर निगम (AMC) चुनाव में अपना वोट डाला। सभी क्षेत्रवासी लोकतंत्र के इस पर्व में अधिक से अधिक संख्या में मतदान करें।
ગુજરાતમાં ચાલી રહેલી સ્થાનિક સ્વરાજ્યની ચૂંટણીઓ અંતર્ગત અમદાવાદ મ્યુનિસિપલ કોર્પોરેશન (AMC)ની ચૂંટણીમાં મેં…
pic.twitter.com/26Xr7OWdWt
— Amit Shah (@AmitShah)
April 26, 2026

***

RK / RR / PS

(Release ID: 2255650)
